title: Bhabhi
actors: Balraj Sahni, Pandari Bai, Jawahar Kaul
plot: Although a graduate in Arts, Shanta agrees to get married to a much lesser educated widowed businessman, Ratanlal, who has a son, Mithu, from his first marriage, and re-locates to live with him, his brothers; Ramesh, Rajan, & Bald...
